prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 8.3L (496 cu in) **Viper V10 (SRT-10 engine code: 8.3L Magnum V10, 90-degree, pushrod, 2-valve per cylinder, iron block/aluminum heads)** with a **Dodge Viper SRT-10 ACR-spec forged internals kit (Mahle forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, Callies crankshaft)** to handle 850+ HP on E85, paired with a **Holley Dominator EFI system** for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Forced Induction: Install a **ProCharger F-3R centrifugal supercharger (11-rib drive system, air-to-air intercooler, 14-16 psi boost)** with a **Viper-specific billet impeller** to avoid surge at high RPM, coupled with a **custom 4-inch stainless steel intercooler piping kit (Vibrant Performance)** and a **Tial 50mm blow-off valve** to prevent compressor stall.

Suspension/Handling: Swap the stock SRT-10 suspension for a **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilover kit (8-position damping adjustment, 2.5-inch monotube shocks, custom valving for 1500 Classic chassis)** paired with **Hotchkis Sport Suspension sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear)** and **Polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension, full set)** to eliminate flex. Add **Brembo GT 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake kit (380mm rotors, two-piece floating design)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: Body Kit: Install a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (RAM 1500 Classic-specific, carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, side skirts)** with **custom 2-inch extended wheel arches** to fit **20x12 ET-15 front / 20x13 ET-5 rear wheels (Forgeline GA3R, matte bronze finish)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/30/20 front, 325/25/20 rear)** for maximum grip.

Aero: Add a **Viper-spec carbon fiber rear wing (Dodge OEM part #5139938AA, modified for RAM 1500 bed integration)** with **adjustable Gurney flap** and a **custom front splitter (Seibon Carbon, 3-piece design with aluminum supports)** to balance downforce. Install **VMR V710 carbon fiber side mirrors** and **LED sequential turn signals (Diode Dynamics SS3)** for a Viper-inspired aesthetic.

Interior: Replace the stock cabin with a **Recaro Pole Position bucket seat (RAM 1500-specific mounting brackets, Schroth 6-point harnesses)** and a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede grip, quick-release hub)**. Add a **Rollcage: Custom 8-point chromoly cage (Autopower, bolt-in design with harness bar)** and **Viper SRT-10 ACR-style Alcantara headliner (custom upholstery by Katzkin)** with **red stitching and SRT-10 embroidery**.
